data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select ai_year , id_card , member_name , address_pres , interest_paid , tax_paid , thai_tax_paid , membership_no , pragan_amt , sumrong_amt ,book_tdate ,coop_name ,manager_name ,position_name , book_tday , book_tmonth , book_tyear , other_income
, RIGHT(to_snumber(other_income),3) as other_income_right , REPLACE( to_snumber(other_income) , RIGHT(to_snumber(other_income),3) , '') as other_income_left , RIGHT(to_snumber(tax_paid),3) as tax_paid_right , REPLACE( to_snumber(tax_paid) , RIGHT(to_snumber(tax_paid),3) , '') as tax_paid_left
from (
SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as book_tdate --วันเดือนปีที่ออกหนังสือรับรอง , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'SD') as book_tday , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'MONTH') as book_tmonth , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'YYYY') as book_tyear , (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , (select manager_position from sc_cnt_m_coop) as position_name --ตำแหน่งผู้เซ็นต์ , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year + 543 as ai_year --ปีภาษีที่จ่าย , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.id_card as id_card , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.prename || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memname || ' ' || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memsurname as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_pres( sc_hr_off_member.membership_no ) as address_pres , nvl( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.paid_amount ),0) as interest_paid , nvl( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_amount ),0) as tax_paid , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( nvl( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_amount ) , 0) ) as thai_tax_paid
, sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no as membership_no , nvl( ( select sum( income_amount ) from sc_hr_off_salary_income_other where 1=1 and income_code = '1020' and official_no = sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no and sal_year = sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) , 0 ) as pragan_amt , nvl( ( select sum( income_amount ) from sc_hr_off_salary_income_other where 1=1 and income_code = '1005' and official_no = sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no and sal_year = sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) , 0 ) as sumrong_amt
, nvl( ( select sum( other_income ) from sc_hr_off_salary_paid where 1=1 and official_no = sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no and sal_year = sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) , 0 ) as other_income
FROM sc_fin_send_tax_hr, sc_hr_off_member, sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE ( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no = sc_hr_off_member.official_no ) and ( sc_hr_off_member.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' ) AND ( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ) ) /*WHERE*/
GROUP BY sc_fin_send_tax_hr.official_no , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.id_card , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.prename , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memname , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memsurname , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_pres( sc_hr_off_member.membership_no ) , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year
union all
SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as book_tdate --วันเดือนปีที่ออกหนังสือรับรอง , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'SD') as book_tday , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'MONTH') as book_tmonth , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date_1!' , 'YYYY') as book_tyear , (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , (select manager_position from sc_cnt_m_coop) as position_name --ตำแหน่งผู้เซ็นต์ , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year + 543 as ai_year --ปีภาษีที่จ่าย , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.id_card as id_card , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.prename || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memname || ' ' || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memsurname as member_name , sc_fin_ucf_company.address_no || ' ' || sc_fin_ucf_company.road || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name ( sc_fin_ucf_company.tambol ) || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name ( sc_fin_ucf_company.province_code , sc_fin_ucf_company.district_code ) || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name ( sc_fin_ucf_company.province_code ) || ' ' || sc_fin_ucf_company.postcode as address_pres , nvl( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.paid_amount ),0) as interest_paid , nvl( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_amount ),0) as tax_paid , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( nvl( sum( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_amount ) , 0) ) as thai_tax_paid
, sc_fin_send_tax_fin.company_id as membership_no , 0.00 as pragan_amt , 0.00 as sumrong_amt , 0.00 as other_income FROM sc_fin_send_tax_fin, sc_fin_ucf_company, sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE 1=1 and ( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.company_id = sc_fin_ucf_company.company_id ) and ( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ) /*WHERE*/
GROUP BY sc_fin_send_tax_fin.company_id , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.id_card , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.prename , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memname , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memsurname , sc_fin_ucf_company.address_no , sc_fin_ucf_company.road , sc_fin_ucf_company.tambol , sc_fin_ucf_company.district_code , sc_fin_ucf_company.province_code , sc_fin_ucf_company.postcode , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) where 1=1 order by membership_no
